# WebToApp Kit

> An Expo SDK 56 template that wraps a web app / PWA into a native iOS + Android app
> that passes Apple App Store review (Guideline 4.2), configured by editing one file
> (`client.config.js`). Designed for AI coding agents to operate end to end: configure,
> validate, build, and submit. Target: a published app in hours, not days.

Rules that matter most: edit only `client.config.js`; use the versioned Expo v56 docs
(<https://docs.expo.dev/versions/v56.0.0/>); never strip the native features that get the
app past Apple 4.2 (push, deep links, share).

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): The operator guide — read first. The whole per-client procedure, config schema, commands, the questions to ask a founder, and the 4.2 guardrails.
- [client.config.js](./client.config.js): THE ONLY FILE YOU EDIT per client (name, bundleId, url, color, domains, feature toggles).
- [src/webtoapp.types.ts](./src/webtoapp.types.ts): Authoritative `ClientConfig` / `WebToAppFeatures` schema — every field and its meaning.
- [docs/ONBOARDING.md](./docs/ONBOARDING.md): Human checklist from clone to published, plus troubleshooting.

## How it works (do not edit for a normal app)

- [app.config.ts](./app.config.ts): Generates the full Expo config from `client.config.js` (bundle id, associatedDomains, intentFilters, plugins, `extra`).
- [src/theme.ts](./src/theme.ts): Runtime config read from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`.
- [src/App.tsx](./src/App.tsx): Offline gate + splash screen + safe areas.
- [src/WebViewScreen.tsx](./src/WebViewScreen.tsx): Main screen — WebView, Android back handler, loading/error states, external-link handling, the native bridge.

## The anti-4.2 native layer (keep it on)

- [src/native/push.ts](./src/native/push.ts): Push registration (expo-notifications) — the strongest 4.2-approval signal.
- [src/native/linking.ts](./src/native/linking.ts): Deep / universal links (iOS associatedDomains + Android intentFilters).
- [src/native/bridge.ts](./src/native/bridge.ts): `window.WebToAppBridge` — native share + web↔native messaging.
- [src/OfflineScreen.tsx](./src/OfflineScreen.tsx): Offline screen with auto-retry.

## Build & ship

- [eas.json](./eas.json): EAS build/submit profiles (development, preview, production).
- [README.md](./README.md): Overview, the per-client job, the web bridge API.
